# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web-app
  labels:
    app: web-app
    tier: frontend
    environment: production
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: web-app
        tier: frontend
        environment: production
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: web-app
          image: your-registry/web-app:latest
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
          env:
            - name: MEMCACHED_HOST
              value: memcached
            - name: MEMCACHED_PORT
              value: "11211"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "250m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: memcached
  labels:
    app: memcached
    tier: cache
    environment: production
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: memcached
        tier: cache
        environment: production
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: memcached
          image: memcached:1.6-alpine
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          args:
            - "-m"
            - "256"
            - "-c"
            - "1024"
          ports:
            - containerPort: 11211
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "100m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "250m"
              memory: "256Mi"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached
  labels:
    app: memcached
    tier: cache
    environment: production
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: memcached
  ports:
    - name: memcached
      port: 11211
      targetPort: 11211
      protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: background-workers
  labels:
    app: background-workers
    tier: worker
    environment: production
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: background-workers
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: background-workers
        tier: worker
        environment: production
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: background-workers
          image: your-registry/background-workers:latest
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          env:
            - name: MEMCACHED_HOST
              value: memcached
            - name: MEMCACHED_PORT
              value: "11211"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
